questions.text: What is the main occupation in rural areas?
questions.explanation: Agriculture is the main occupation in rural areas. Most people depend on farming for their livelihood.

questions.text: Small farmers own large pieces of land.
questions.explanation: Small farmers own small pieces of land, often less than 2 hectares. Large farmers own bigger landholdings.

questions.text: Why do farmers take loans from moneylenders?
questions.correctAnswer: Farmers take loans for seeds, fertilizers, and other farming expenses when they don't have enough money.
questions.explanation: Farmers often need money for inputs like seeds and fertilizers. Banks may not be easily accessible, so they turn to local moneylenders.

questions.text: People who work on others' land for wages are called ________.
questions.explanation: Landless labourers are people who don't own land and work on others' farms for daily wages.
